name: cross-system-autevolver
description: Cross-System Evolution Orchestrator. Composes detected plugin chains into automated workflows, generates evolution proposals, detects capability gaps, and triggers self-correction. This is the autevolution layer.
author: jacksonjp0311-gif / Annie

schema.title: Autevolve
schema.description: Run cross-system evolution analysis. Gathers state from ecosystem-status, emergence-detect, and trajectory-analyzes, then generates prioritized evolution proposals. Composes the 4 detected plugin chains into actionable workflows.
